title: Equal parts of circles
description: Practice telling if circles are divided into 2, 3, or 4 equal sections.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which circles are divided into halves?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in half, we divide the whole into **$2$ equal parts**.

These circles are divided into $3$ pieces:  

![A circle divided into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b380a840c8febc1b9000c7ab75c4f35f7f748a82)
![A circle is divided into 3 unequal parts. 1 part is over half the circle. The other 2 parts are less than one-fourth the circle.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/dc78445f790809410b0e7c31aceb9a84b1d8c608)

These circles are divided into halves:  

![2 circles. Each one is divided into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/46d14851c942db6ccae854e1c9c87615ab2c9348)  ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4b4755e6e6688401738524f53e4fc4a097911069)

choices.content: ![A circle has a line passing through the center dividing it into 2 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4b4755e6e6688401738524f53e4fc4a097911069)
![A circle has a line passing through the center dividing it into 2 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/46d14851c942db6ccae854e1c9c87615ab2c9348)

![A circle is divided into 3 unequal parts. 1 part is over half the circle. The other 2 parts are less than one-fourth the circle.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/dc78445f790809410b0e7c31aceb9a84b1d8c608)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which circles are divided into halves?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in half, we divide the whole into **$2$ equal parts**.

This circle is divided into $3$ pieces:  

![A circle is divided into 3 unequal parts. 2 parts are almost half the circle. The third part is a very small section.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/27c324ac39dfee259f0d22a03caeb1050dd53b0d)

This circle is divided into $2$ pieces, but the pieces are not equal in size:  

![A circle has a line that does not pass through the center dividing it into 2 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/03524415014c33097474902a2a107e7e05bb1ef3)

These circles are divided into halves:  

![Two circles have a line passing through the center dividing them into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b1235d7389f6fe27509254aecf6bdfb5c9cfc1a4) ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c1375863e8b4a58fbb00744a220c369701129726)

choices.content: ![A circle is divided into 3 unequal parts. 2 parts are almost half the circle. The third part is a very small section.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/27c324ac39dfee259f0d22a03caeb1050dd53b0d)
![A circle has a line passing through the center dividing it into 2 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c1375863e8b4a58fbb00744a220c369701129726)
![A circle has a line passing through the center dividing it into 2 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b1235d7389f6fe27509254aecf6bdfb5c9cfc1a4)
![A circle has a line that does not pass through the center dividing it into 2 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/03524415014c33097474902a2a107e7e05bb1ef3)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which circles are divided into halves?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in half, we divide the whole into **$2$ equal parts**.

This circle is divided into $4$ equal pieces:  

![A circle has two lines passing through the center dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/255991878292eece7058378c673fe91f18a2dfcd)

This circle is divided into $2$ pieces, but the pieces are not equal in size:  

![A circle has a line that does not pass through the center dividing it into 2 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/56c754cd9878e09d591ba74274a6fad0ce021e6b)

These circles are divided into halves:  

![2 circles. Each one is divided into 2 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1cf4eb548314de1ca46239b30c74d2204b775d03) ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b74a74128cec3ef491aba4237553ca8c9122d943)

choices.content: ![A circle has two lines passing through the center dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/255991878292eece7058378c673fe91f18a2dfcd)
![A circle has a line passing through the center dividing it into 2 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1cf4eb548314de1ca46239b30c74d2204b775d03)
![A circle has a line passing through the center dividing it into 2 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b74a74128cec3ef491aba4237553ca8c9122d943)
![A circle has a line that does not pass through the center dividing it into 2 parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/56c754cd9878e09d591ba74274a6fad0ce021e6b)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which circle is divided into thirds?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in thirds, we divide the whole into **$3$ equal parts**.

These circles are divided into $3$ pieces, but the pieces are not equal in size:  

![A circle has 2 parallel lines passing through it. The lines divide the circle in 3 slices.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e015e3190bb69a2e44433a5622d7b912e8f6490e)

![A circle has 2 parallel lines passing through it. The lines divide the circle in 3 slices.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4c080e44636bbb5c431defbace2dafda1b6f91d1)

This circle is divided into $4$ pieces:  

![A circle has two lines passing through the center dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/00de5ec2f0e315b1328706a6fbde11ccb15ba387)

This circle is divided into thirds:  

![A circle divided into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c5ab24bfbace75da4019aaba2f3873ac4fcd89be)

choices.content: ![A circle has 2 parallel lines passing through it. The lines divide the circle in 3 slices.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e015e3190bb69a2e44433a5622d7b912e8f6490e)
![A circle has 2 parallel lines passing through it. The lines divide the circle in 3 slices.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4c080e44636bbb5c431defbace2dafda1b6f91d1)
![A circle has two lines passing through the center dividing it into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/00de5ec2f0e315b1328706a6fbde11ccb15ba387)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which circles are divided into thirds?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in thirds, we divide the whole into **$3$ equal parts**.

These circles are divided into $3$ pieces, but the pieces are not equal in size:  

![2 circles. The first is divided into 3 unequal pieces with 2 parallel lines dividing the circle. The second is divided into 3 unequal pieces with 2 large pieces and 1 small piece.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1c34d7c17f5f846370b4e537bb2f0f36a2b17f38) ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d3ea9fb4e8ce7d47e5a20e0e8950d34f845ab412)

These circles are divided into thirds:  

![2 circles. Each circle is divided into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f412b01c95675fc87bca643892b0dc09f81fc1d7) ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/aa63d162c6a0a4a6624e458a56fefdc50274ef18)

choices.content: ![A circle has 2 parallel lines passing through it. The lines divide the circle in 3 sections.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1c34d7c17f5f846370b4e537bb2f0f36a2b17f38)
![A circle is divided into 3 unequal parts. 2 parts are almost half the circle. The third part is a very small section.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d3ea9fb4e8ce7d47e5a20e0e8950d34f845ab412)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which circles are divided into thirds?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in thirds, we divide the whole into **$3$ equal parts**.

This circle is divided into $3$ pieces, but the pieces are not equal in size:  

![A circle is divided into 3 parts. One part is half the circle. The other part is divided into two sections.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/149eeab750323e1daddf13a8624c27e774d0ac00)

This circle is divided into $2$ equal pieces:  

![A circle is divided into two equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/46d14851c942db6ccae854e1c9c87615ab2c9348)

These circles are divided into thirds:  

![Two circles are each divided into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/54dd96691f7fb8a34a00523304a19b0f8b0157c0) ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fdcbe2191a640aaf5e424e622228cf6134a2ab2c)

choices.content: ![A circle is divided into two equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/46d14851c942db6ccae854e1c9c87615ab2c9348)
![A circle is divided into 3 parts. One part is half the circle. The other part is divided into two sections. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/149eeab750323e1daddf13a8624c27e774d0ac00)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which circles are divided into fourths?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: To divide a shape in fourths, we divide the whole into **$4$ equal parts**.

This circle is divided into $4$ pieces, but the pieces are not equal in size: 
 
![A circle is divided into 4 parts. One part is half the circle. The other half is divided into 3 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/711b1f0e595006d37206f8003f4ffa74b11de883)

This circle is divided into $6$ equal parts:  

![A circle is divided into 6 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5afbc659bb80b22a33767e0c6b96ee3685b7b52c)

These circles are divided into fourths: 
 
![A circle is divided into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/14e2265cc37856397eb969afb19d1dd9ef5b4c25)

![A circle is divided into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/46bee4f8abb3c35a6adf7848c0bf142bfeec61ba)

choices.content: ![A circle is divided into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/14e2265cc37856397eb969afb19d1dd9ef5b4c25)
![A circle is divided into 6 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5afbc659bb80b22a33767e0c6b96ee3685b7b52c)

![A circle is divided into 4 parts. One part is half the circle. The other half is divided into 3 equal parts.]( web+graphie://cdn.kastatic.org/ka-perseus-graphie/711b1f0e595006d37206f8003f4ffa74b11de883)
![A circle is divided into 4 equal parts.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/46bee4f8abb3c35a6adf7848c0bf142bfeec61ba)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which circles are divided into fourths?**

hints: To divide a shape in fourths, we divide the whole into **$4$ equal parts**.

This circle is divided into $3$ pieces:

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which circle shows one half of the shape shaded?**

[[☃ radio 3]]
hints:
This circle is split into $3$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{thirds}$, with $1$ piece shaded.  

![A circle divided into 3 equal parts. One part is shaded blue.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2399a356169c74b08bbcd4cb79135be0ea0c67b3)

This circle has one third of the shape shaded.

This circle is **not** split into $2$ equal-sized pieces. 

![A circle divided into 2 unequal parts. The small part is shaded purple.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fbb319dc7922071bf0300147e0a48c717e22200a)

This circle is split into $2$ equal-sized pieces, or $\text{halves}$, with $1$ piece shaded.  

![A circle divided into 2 equal parts. One part is shaded gold.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d58ae0ddc0beb799fe8936cc7e2eabd2afc23ca4)

The circle has one half of the shape shaded.

This circle has **one half** of the shape shaded:

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d58ae0ddc0beb799fe8936cc7e2eabd2afc23ca4)

choices.content: ![A circle divided into 3 equal parts. One part is shaded blue.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2399a356169c74b08bbcd4cb79135be0ea0c67b3)
![A circle divided into 2 equal parts. One part is shaded gold.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d58ae0ddc0beb799fe8936cc7e2eabd2afc23ca4)
![A circle divided into 2 unequal parts. The small part is shaded purple.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fbb319dc7922071bf0300147e0a48c717e22200a)

assessment_items.question_content:
The circle is split into $2$ equal-sized pieces.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a52e597dd0a514beaf2d5b942fe4426eb9e256a0)

**What part of the circle is shaded?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
This circle is split into $2$ equal-sized pieces, or halves. There are $2$ pieces shaded.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a52e597dd0a514beaf2d5b942fe4426eb9e256a0)

The circle has **two halves** of the shape shaded.
We can describe the circle as **two halves**.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3aba3765ad89caade726110da4160a48b060302e)

The circle has **three thirds** of the shape shaded.
We can describe the circle as **three thirds**.

assessment_items.question_content:

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b42fd29d8db3fddafdb46dae7b75dbd8447d0ba7)

**What part of the circle is shaded?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
